title: geranium pseudosibiricum var. subuschkanense
intro: Geranium pseudosibiricum var. subuschkanense, also known as Siberian geranium, is a plant species within the geranium family, Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Siberian geranium is often used as a tincture or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
